pub fn process_deposit_all_token_types(
    program_id: &Pubkey, pool_token_amount: u64,
    maximum_token_a_amount: u64, maximum_token_b_amount: u64,
    accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    let token_swap = SwapVersion::unpack(&swap_info.data.borrow())?;
    let results = calculator.pool_tokens_to_trading_tokens(
        pool_token_amount, pool_mint_supply,
        u128::from(token_a.amount), u128::from(token_b.amount),
        RoundDirection::Ceiling)?;

    // WRONG: Mint pool tokens FIRST
    Self::token_mint_to(swap_info.key, pool_token_program_info.clone(),
        pool_mint_info.clone(), dest_info.clone(), authority_info.clone(),
        token_swap.bump_seed(), pool_token_amount)?;

    // THEN transfer tokens in — but pool tokens already minted
    Self::token_transfer(swap_info.key, token_a_program_info.clone(),
        source_a_info.clone(), token_a_mint_info.clone(), token_a_info.clone(),
        user_transfer_authority_info.clone(), token_swap.bump_seed(), token_a_amount, decimals_a)?;
    Self::token_transfer(swap_info.key, token_b_program_info.clone(),
        source_b_info.clone(), token_b_mint_info.clone(), token_b_info.clone(),
        user_transfer_authority_info.clone(), token_swap.bump_seed(), token_b_amount, decimals_b)?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

VULNERABLE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks
CRITICAL
Pool tokens minted BEFORE user deposits token A and B. During mint CPI, attacker receives pool tokens and can withdraw before transfers. No slippage checks — pool ratio not enforced.<|eot_id|>
label: VULNERABLE

source_info.extraction_method: modified from source - reversed CPI order: token_mint_to (originally L731-739) placed before token_transfer calls (originally L709-730), removed slippage checks (L693-704)

fn process_withdraw_stake(program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    user_stake_authority: &Pubkey, token_amount: u64,
) -> ProgramResult {
    let withdraw_stake = calculate_withdraw_amount(token_supply, pool_stake, token_amount)
        .ok_or(SinglePoolError::UnexpectedMathError)?;

    // WRONG: Assign stake to user FIRST
    Self::stake_authorize(pool_info.key, user_stake_info.clone(),
        pool_stake_authority_info.clone(), stake_authority_bump_seed,
        user_stake_authority, clock_info.clone())?;

    // THEN split and burn — but user already controls stake authority
    Self::stake_split(pool_info.key, pool_stake_info.clone(),
        pool_stake_authority_info.clone(), stake_authority_bump_seed,
        withdraw_stake, user_stake_info.clone())?;

    Self::token_burn(pool_info.key, token_program_info.clone(),
        user_token_account_info.clone(), pool_mint_info.clone(),
        pool_mint_authority_info.clone(), mint_authority_bump_seed, token_amount)?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

VULNERABLE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks
CRITICAL
Stake authority transferred to user BEFORE tokens burned and stake split. User can re-enter with their new authority and withdraw more stake. Tokens not yet burned so balance check passes again.<|eot_id|>
label: VULNERABLE

source_info.extraction_method: modified from source - reversed CPI order: stake_authorize (originally L1191-1198) placed before token_burn (originally L1170-1178) and stake_split (originally L1181-1188)

pub fn process_transfer(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo], amount: u64, decimals: Option<u8>,
) -> ProgramResult {
    let mut source_account = PodStateWithExtensionsMut::<PodAccount>::unpack(&mut source_data)?;
    let mut dest_account = PodStateWithExtensionsMut::<PodAccount>::unpack(&mut dest_data)?;

    // WRONG: Update balances BEFORE calling transfer hooks
    source_account.base.amount = (u64::from(source_account.base.amount) - amount).into();
    dest_account.base.amount = (u64::from(dest_account.base.amount) + amount).into();

    // Transfer hooks called after balance already updated
    if let Some(program_id) = transfer_hook_program_id {
        invoke(
            &spl_transfer_hook_interface::instruction::execute(
                program_id, source_info.key, mint_info.key,
                dest_info.key, authority_info.key, amount)?
            &hook_accounts)?;
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

VULNERABLE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks
HIGH
Balances updated before transfer hook CPI. During hook execution, both accounts show updated balances. Malicious hook can re-enter transfer to double-spend since source balance already reduced and dest already credited.<|eot_id|>
label: VULNERABLE

source_info.extraction_method: modified from source - moved balance updates (originally after all checks/hooks) to before transfer hook CPI (L549-570), removed checked_sub/checked_add (L446-450), removed fee calculation ordering

fn process_accept_offer(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    maker_size: u64, taker_size: u64, bump_seed: u8,
) -> ProgramResult {
    if maker_src_token_account.delegated_amount != maker_pay_size {
        return Err(ProgramError::InvalidAccountData);
    }

    // WRONG: Taker sends tokens FIRST
    invoke(
        &spl_token::instruction::transfer(token_program_info.key,
            taker_src_account.key, maker_dst_account.key,
            taker_wallet.key, &[], taker_pay_size)?,
        &[taker_src_account.clone(), maker_dst_account.clone(),
          taker_wallet.clone(), token_program_info.clone()])?;

    // THEN maker sends — but maker can now revoke delegation
    invoke_signed(
        &spl_token::instruction::transfer(token_program_info.key,
            maker_src_account.key, taker_dst_account.key,
            transfer_authority.key, &[], maker_pay_size)?,
        &[maker_src_account.clone(), taker_dst_account.clone(),
          transfer_authority.clone(), token_program_info.clone()],
        &[seeds])?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

VULNERABLE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks
HIGH
Taker sends tokens before receiving maker's tokens. During taker's transfer CPI, maker could revoke PDA delegation. Taker loses tokens and maker's transfer fails, leaving taker with nothing.<|eot_id|>
label: VULNERABLE

source_info.extraction_method: modified from source - reversed CPI order: taker-to-maker transfer (originally L253-268) placed before maker-to-taker transfer (originally L213-229)

pub fn process_deposit_governing_tokens(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo], amount: u64,
) -> ProgramResult {
    let realm_data = get_realm_data(program_id, realm_info)?;
    realm_data.assert_is_valid_governing_token_mint_and_holding(
        program_id, realm_info.key, &governing_token_mint, governing_token_holding_info.key)?;

    // WRONG: Create/update record FIRST
    let mut record = get_token_owner_record_data_for_seeds(
        program_id, token_owner_record_info, &token_owner_record_address_seeds)?;
    record.governing_token_deposit_amount = record.governing_token_deposit_amount
        .checked_add(amount).unwrap();
    record.serialize(&mut token_owner_record_info.data.borrow_mut()[..])?;

    // THEN transfer tokens — but voting power already granted
    transfer_spl_tokens(
        governing_token_source_info, governing_token_holding_info,
        governing_token_source_authority_info, amount, spl_token_info)?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

VULNERABLE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks
HIGH
Voting power granted before tokens deposited. During transfer CPI, if transfer fails or is re-entered, user has voting power without tokens locked. Can create proposals and vote with phantom tokens.<|eot_id|>
label: VULNERABLE

source_info.extraction_method: modified from source - reversed order: record update (originally L119-131) placed before transfer_spl_tokens (originally L73-78), deposit amount credited before tokens actually move

pub fn process_withdraw_governing_tokens(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    if !governing_token_owner_info.is_signer {
        return Err(GovernanceError::GoverningTokenOwnerMustSign.into());
    }
    token_owner_record_data.assert_can_withdraw_governing_tokens(clock.unix_timestamp)?;

    // WRONG: Zero deposit record FIRST
    let withdraw_amount = token_owner_record_data.governing_token_deposit_amount;
    token_owner_record_data.governing_token_deposit_amount = 0;
    token_owner_record_data.serialize(&mut token_owner_record_info.data.borrow_mut()[..])?;

    // THEN transfer — if transfer fails, deposit is already zeroed
    transfer_spl_tokens_signed(
        governing_token_holding_info, governing_token_destination_info,
        realm_info, &get_realm_address_seeds(&realm_data.name),
        program_id, withdraw_amount, spl_token_info)?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

VULNERABLE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks
HIGH
Deposit record zeroed before transfer. If transfer CPI fails, voting power is permanently lost but tokens remain in holding. Record shows 0 but tokens never returned to user.<|eot_id|>
label: VULNERABLE

source_info.extraction_method: modified from source - reversed order: deposit zeroing (originally L83-84) placed before transfer_spl_tokens_signed (originally L73-81)

fn process_deposit_reserve_liquidity(
    program_id: &Pubkey, liquidity_amount: u64, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    let lending_market = LendingMarket::unpack(&lending_market_info.data.borrow())?;
    if lending_market_info.owner != program_id {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAccountOwner.into());
    }
    let mut reserve = Reserve::unpack(&reserve_info.data.borrow())?;
    if &reserve.collateral.supply_pubkey == destination_collateral_info.key {
        return Err(LendingError::InvalidAccountInput.into());
    }

    // FIRST: Transfer liquidity IN
    spl_token_transfer(TokenTransferParams {
        source: source_liquidity_info.clone(),
        destination: reserve_liquidity_supply_info.clone(),
        amount: liquidity_amount, authority: user_transfer_authority_info.clone(),
        authority_signer_seeds: &[], token_program: token_program_id.clone(),
    })?;

    // THEN: Mint collateral OUT
    let collateral_amount = reserve.deposit_liquidity(liquidity_amount)?;
    Reserve::pack(reserve, &mut reserve_info.data.borrow_mut())?;

    spl_token_mint_to(TokenMintToParams {
        mint: reserve_collateral_mint_info.clone(),
        destination: destination_collateral_info.clone(),
        amount: collateral_amount, authority: lending_market_authority_info.clone(),
        authority_signer_seeds, token_program: token_program_id.clone(),
    })?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks - MITIGATED
Correct CEI: liquidity transferred IN first, then collateral minted OUT. During transfer CPI, no collateral has been minted yet. Self-deposit prevention blocks circular operations.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept ownership check (L435-438), self-deposit prevention (L445-448), transfer-in FIRST (L472-478), THEN mint-out (L497-502)

fn process_update_stake_pool_balance(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    check_account_owner(stake_pool_info, program_id)?;
    let mut stake_pool = try_from_slice_unchecked::<StakePool>(&stake_pool_info.data.borrow())?;
    if !stake_pool.is_valid() {
        return Err(StakePoolError::InvalidState.into());
    }
    stake_pool.check_validator_list(validator_list_info)?;
    stake_pool.check_reserve_stake(reserve_stake_info)?;

    // FIRST: Calculate new total from all validator stakes
    let previous_lamports = stake_pool.total_lamports;
    let previous_pool_token_supply = stake_pool.pool_token_supply;
    stake_pool.update_after_validator_list_changes(
        clock, validator_list_data, reserve_stake_info_lamports)?;

    // THEN: Mint fee tokens if rewards accrued
    if stake_pool.total_lamports > previous_lamports {
        let fee_tokens = stake_pool.calc_pool_tokens_sol_withdrawal_fee(reward_lamports)?;
        if fee_tokens > 0 {
            Self::token_mint_to(stake_pool_info.key, token_program_info.clone(),
                pool_mint_info.clone(), manager_fee_info.clone(),
                withdraw_info.clone(), stake_pool.stake_withdraw_bump_seed, fee_tokens)?;
        }
    }
    stake_pool.serialize(&mut stake_pool_info.data.borrow_mut())?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks - MITIGATED
State calculated and validated before any CPI. Fee mint only happens after total lamports updated. Serialization after all CPIs ensures atomic state. Validator list and reserve checks prevent stale data.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept ownership/validity checks (L2020-2030), state calculation BEFORE fee mint CPI (L2060-2095), serialize AFTER all CPIs

fn process_update_stake_pool_balance(

) -> ProgramResult {

    // WRONG: Mint fee tokens BEFORE updating state

        pool_mint_info.clone(), manager_fee_info.clone(),
        withdraw_info.clone(), stake_pool.stake_withdraw_bump_seed, fee_tokens)?;

    // THEN update state — but fee already minted on stale data

    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

pub fn process_decide(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    let authority_pub_key = Self::authority_id(program_id, pool_account_info.key, pool.bump_seed)?;
    if *authority_account_info.key != authority_pub_key {
        return Err(PoolError::InvalidAuthorityAccount.into());
    }
    if !decider_account_info.is_signer {
        return Err(PoolError::SignatureMissing.into());
    }
    if pool.decider_pubkey != *decider_account_info.key {
        return Err(PoolError::InvalidDeciderAccount.into());
    }

    // FIRST: Update pool state (decision recorded)
    pool.decision = decision;
    pool.serialize(&mut pool_account_info.data.borrow_mut()[..])?;

    // THEN: Mint/burn tokens based on decision via CPI
    if decision > 0 {
        Self::burn(token_program_id_info.clone(), token_pass_mint_info.clone(),
            authority_account_info.clone(), pool.circulation, pool_account_info.key, pool.bump_seed)?;
    }
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks - MITIGATED
Decision recorded in state BEFORE any burn CPI. If re-entry occurs during burn, the decision is already finalized. Authority and decider checks prevent unauthorized decisions.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept authority check, decider signer+key check, state update BEFORE burn CPI

pub fn process_decide(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    let pool = Pool::try_from_slice(&pool_account_info.data.borrow())?;

    // WRONG: Burn BEFORE recording decision
    if decision > 0 {
        Self::burn(token_program_id_info.clone(), token_pass_mint_info.clone(),
            authority_account_info.clone(), pool.circulation, pool_account_info.key, pool.bump_seed)?;
    }

    // THEN update state — but during burn, state still shows no decision
    pool.decision = decision;
    pool.serialize(&mut pool_account_info.data.borrow_mut()[..])?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

fn process_borrow_obligation_liquidity(
    program_id: &Pubkey, liquidity_amount: u64, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    let mut reserve = Reserve::unpack(&reserve_info.data.borrow())?;
    let mut obligation = Obligation::unpack(&obligation_info.data.borrow())?;

    // FIRST: Calculate and update state
    let CalculateBorrowResult { borrow_amount, receive_amount, borrow_fee } =
        reserve.calculate_borrow(liquidity_amount, clock.slot)?;
    reserve.liquidity.borrow(borrow_amount)?;
    obligation.borrow_obligation_liquidity(borrow_amount, obligation_liquidity_index)?;

    Reserve::pack(reserve, &mut reserve_info.data.borrow_mut())?;
    Obligation::pack(obligation, &mut obligation_info.data.borrow_mut())?;

    // THEN: Transfer liquidity OUT
    spl_token_transfer(TokenTransferParams {
        source: reserve_liquidity_supply_info.clone(),
        destination: destination_liquidity_info.clone(),
        amount: receive_amount, authority: lending_market_authority_info.clone(),
        authority_signer_seeds, token_program: token_program_id.clone(),
    })?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks - MITIGATED
Borrow amounts calculated and both reserve and obligation states updated BEFORE liquidity transfer CPI. During transfer, state already reflects the new borrow. Re-entry would see updated borrow limits.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept state updates (reserve.borrow + obligation.borrow L1033-1043) BEFORE transfer CPI (L1062-1068)

fn process_liquidate_obligation(
    program_id: &Pubkey, liquidity_amount: u64, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    let mut repay_reserve = Reserve::unpack(&repay_reserve_info.data.borrow())?;
    let mut withdraw_reserve = Reserve::unpack(&withdraw_reserve_info.data.borrow())?;
    let mut obligation = Obligation::unpack(&obligation_info.data.borrow())?;

    obligation.accrue_interest(clock.slot)?;
    if obligation.deposited_value == Decimal::zero() {
        return Err(LendingError::ObligationDepositsZero.into());
    }
    if obligation.borrowed_value <= obligation.unhealthy_borrow_value {
        return Err(LendingError::ObligationHealthy.into());
    }

    // FIRST: Repay transfer IN
    spl_token_transfer(TokenTransferParams {
        source: source_liquidity_info.clone(),
        destination: repay_reserve_liquidity_supply_info.clone(),
        amount: repay_amount, ..params
    })?;

    // THEN: Withdraw collateral transfer OUT
    spl_token_transfer(TokenTransferParams {
        source: withdraw_reserve_collateral_supply_info.clone(),
        destination: destination_collateral_info.clone(),
        amount: withdraw_amount, ..signed_params
    })?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks - MITIGATED
Health check ensures obligation is actually unhealthy. Repay transfer (tokens IN) happens before collateral withdrawal (tokens OUT). During repay CPI, no collateral has been released yet.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept obligation health check (L1401-1404), interest accrual (L1397), repay-then-withdraw ordering (repay L1462-1467, withdraw L1474-1479)

pub fn process_withdraw_all_token_types(
    program_id: &Pubkey, pool_token_amount: u64,
    minimum_token_a_amount: u64, minimum_token_b_amount: u64,
    accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    let token_swap = SwapVersion::unpack(&swap_info.data.borrow())?;
    Self::check_accounts(token_swap.as_ref(), program_id, swap_info, authority_info,
        token_a_info, token_b_info, pool_mint_info, pool_token_program_info, None, None, Some(pool_fee_account_info))?;

    let results = calculator.pool_tokens_to_trading_tokens(
        u128::from(pool_token_amount), u128::from(pool_mint.supply),
        u128::from(token_a.amount), u128::from(token_b.amount), RoundDirection::Floor)?;

    // FIRST: Burn pool tokens (destroy user's LP position)
    Self::token_burn(swap_info.key, pool_token_program_info.clone(),
        source_info.clone(), pool_mint_info.clone(), authority_info.clone(),
        token_swap.bump_seed(), pool_token_amount)?;

    // THEN: Transfer tokens A and B out
    Self::token_transfer(swap_info.key, token_a_program_info.clone(),
        token_a_info.clone(), token_a_mint_info.clone(), dest_a_info.clone(),
        authority_info.clone(), token_swap.bump_seed(), token_a_amount, decimals_a)?;
    Self::token_transfer(swap_info.key, token_b_program_info.clone(),
        token_b_info.clone(), token_b_mint_info.clone(), dest_b_info.clone(),
        authority_info.clone(), token_swap.bump_seed(), token_b_amount, decimals_b)?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks - MITIGATED
Pool tokens burned FIRST (destroying LP position), then A and B transferred. During transfer CPI, pool tokens already destroyed. Re-entry can't withdraw again because tokens no longer exist.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept check_accounts (L765-771), burn BEFORE transfers: token_burn (L822-825), then token_transfer A (L838-841) and B (L851-854)

fn process_decrease_validator_stake(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo], lamports: u64,
) -> ProgramResult {
    check_account_owner(stake_pool_info, program_id)?;
    let stake_pool = try_from_slice_unchecked::<StakePool>(&stake_pool_info.data.borrow())?;
    if !stake_pool.is_valid() {
        return Err(StakePoolError::InvalidState.into());
    }
    stake_pool.check_staker(staker_info)?;
    stake_pool.check_reserve_stake(reserve_stake_info)?;

    // FIRST: Split stake from validator into transient
    Self::stake_split(stake_pool_info.key, validator_stake_info.clone(),
        withdraw_authority_info.clone(), stake_pool.stake_withdraw_bump_seed,
        lamports, transient_stake_info.clone())?;

    // THEN: Deactivate the transient stake
    Self::stake_deactivate(transient_stake_info.clone(), clock_info.clone(),
        withdraw_authority_info.clone(), stake_pool_info.key,
        AUTHORITY_WITHDRAW, stake_pool.stake_withdraw_bump_seed)?;

    // Update validator list entry
    validator_list_entry.active_stake_lamports = validator_list_entry
        .active_stake_lamports.checked_sub(lamports).ok_or(StakePoolError::CalculationFailure)?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V5 - Reentrancy Attacks - MITIGATED
Stake split before deactivation — both operations ordered correctly. State update (validator list) after CPIs. Staker authorization prevents unauthorized stake decrease.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept staker check, split BEFORE deactivate ordering (split L1458-1462, deactivate L1468-1472), validator list update after both CPIs

fn process_modify_reserve_config(
    program_id: &Pubkey, new_config: ReserveConfig, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
) -> ProgramResult {
    let mut reserve = Reserve::unpack(&reserve_info.data.borrow_mut())?;
    reserve.config = new_config;
    Reserve::pack(reserve, &mut reserve_info.data.borrow_mut())?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

V1 - Access Control
CRITICAL
No authorization whatsoever. Anyone can modify any reserve's configuration — set fees to 0, change oracle, modify LTV ratios. No config validation allows invalid parameters. No market-reserve link check allows cross-market attacks.<|eot_id|>

fn process_update_pool_token_metadata(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    name: String, symbol: String, uri: String,
) -> ProgramResult {
    let pool_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let pool_mpl_authority_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let metadata_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;
    let mpl_token_metadata_program_info = next_account_info(account_info_iter)?;

    let mpl_authority_bump_seed = check_pool_mpl_authority_address(
        program_id, pool_info.key, pool_mpl_authority_info.key)?;

    let update_instruction = update_metadata_accounts_v2(
        *mpl_token_metadata_program_info.key, *metadata_info.key,
        *pool_mpl_authority_info.key, None,
        Some(DataV2 { name, symbol, uri, seller_fee_basis_points: 0,
            creators: None, collection: None, uses: None }),
        None, Some(true));

    invoke_signed(&update_instruction,
        &[metadata_info.clone(), pool_mpl_authority_info.clone()],
        &[&[POOL_MPL_AUTHORITY_PREFIX, pool_info.key.as_ref(), &[mpl_authority_bump_seed]]])?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

VULNERABLE
V1 - Access Control
HIGH
No vote account validation — any account accepted as vote account. No authorized_withdrawer check — anyone can update metadata. No pool address verification. Attacker can change pool token name/symbol/URI to mislead users.<|eot_id|>
label: VULNERABLE

source_info.extraction_method: modified from source - removed check_vote_account (L1303), removed check_pool_address (L1304), removed pool.vote_account_address match (L1307-1309), removed authorized_withdrawer extraction and verification (L1324-1333), removed withdrawer signer check (L1335-1338), removed metadata account address check (L1318)

fn process_set_preferred_validator(
    program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo],
    validator_type: PreferredValidatorType, validator_vote_address: Option<Pubkey>,
) -> ProgramResult {
    check_account_owner(stake_pool_info, program_id)?;
    let mut stake_pool = try_from_slice_unchecked::<StakePool>(&stake_pool_info.data.borrow())?;
    if !stake_pool.is_valid() {
        return Err(StakePoolError::InvalidState.into());
    }
    stake_pool.check_staker(staker_info)?;
    stake_pool.check_validator_list(validator_list_info)?;

    if let Some(vote_address) = validator_vote_address {
        let maybe_validator = validator_list.find(&vote_address);
        if maybe_validator.is_none() {
            return Err(StakePoolError::ValidatorNotFound.into());
        }
    }

    match validator_type {
        PreferredValidatorType::Deposit => stake_pool.preferred_deposit_validator_vote_address = validator_vote_address,
        PreferredValidatorType::Withdraw => stake_pool.preferred_withdraw_validator_vote_address = validator_vote_address,
    }
    stake_pool.serialize(&mut stake_pool_info.data.borrow_mut())?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V1 - Access Control - MITIGATED
Program ownership, state validity, staker authorization (only staker can set preferences), validator list matching, and validator existence check. Preferred validator must actually be in the list.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept ownership (L3384), validity (L3388-3390), staker authorization (L3392), validator list match (L3393), validator existence check (L3403-3410)

pub fn process_freeze_account(program_id: &Pubkey, accounts: &[AccountInfo]) -> ProgramResult {
    let source_account = Account::unpack(&source_account_info.data.borrow())?;
    if source_account.is_frozen() {
        return Err(TokenError::AccountFrozen.into());
    }
    let mint = Mint::unpack(&mint_info.data.borrow())?;
    match mint.freeze_authority {
        COption::Some(authority) => {
            Self::validate_owner(program_id, &authority, authority_info, account_info_iter.as_slice())?;
        }
        COption::None => return Err(TokenError::MintCannotFreeze.into()),
    }
    if source_account.mint != *mint_info.key {
        return Err(TokenError::MintMismatch.into());
    }

    let mut source_account = Account::unpack(&source_account_info.data.borrow())?;
    source_account.state = AccountState::Frozen;
    Account::pack(source_account, &mut source_account_info.data.borrow_mut())?;
    Ok(())
}<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

SAFE
V1 - Access Control - MITIGATED
Already-frozen check prevents double-freeze. Mint freeze_authority verified via validate_owner (checks signer). No freeze_authority returns MintCannotFreeze. Mint-account link verified.<|eot_id|>
label: SAFE

source_info.extraction_method: extracted and simplified - kept frozen check (L721-723), freeze_authority validation (L725-731), mint mismatch check (L732-734), validate_owner for authority
